subject: Fix typo in AppcLcmRecipeFormatter
commit_message:
Fix typo in AppcLcmRecipeFormatter

Import of StringUtils package declaration has a typo
due to this maven build fails. Fix the typo change
lang to lang3

Issue-ID: POLICY-1014
Change-Id: Ic8d0a91d49df612dc0bb34b4a36153bacfd2e586
Signed-off-by: Krishnajinka <kris.jinka@samsung.com>
